race.description: Fore Design + Flex Planning Maiden Plate
race.comment: ARTFUL MAXIMUS (5) stuck on gamely into the placings on debut here a fortnight ago. He'll take plenty from that experience and from the inside draw he should get every chance. CAMOOWEAL GIRL (9) caught the eye here fresh before chasing strongly into fourth last time when well supported. She looks to be peaking now, but the wide draw means she'll likely be coming from the back and charging late.  QUILLAN (13) made significant ground from the rear to just miss here two weeks ago. The wide gate makes things tougher, but she'll be finishing off strongly again. GREEN SUMMER (6) closed off nicely to finish midfield in town on debut and will be better for that outing. The step up in trip looks ideal. HELL'S ON FIRE (10) is another who finished off well on debut and is worth following up.
